flavourText: A shadowy figure guarding the archives of history. Only those who can truly analyse a source will earn passage through!
A time-travelling physician who has treated patients across the centuries. Can you trace the story of medicine from leeches to penicillin?
Gloriana herself demands your knowledge of her reign. Impress her court or face the Tower!
A dark chapter of history guards this gate. Show your understanding of how democracy was destroyed - and why it matters.
The Cold War general tests your knowledge of superpower rivalry. Navigate the crises without triggering mutually assured destruction!
The Duke of Normandy challenges you to prove you understand how he seized and held England. Show no weakness!
Law and order on the Great Plains! The Marshal wants to know if you can handle the wild truth of the American West.
From Magna Carta to the miners' strike, this champion of rights tests whether you know how ordinary people changed history.
Order in the court! The Hanging Judge will test your knowledge of crime, punishment and justice through the ages.
The toughest marker in the land! Defeat them with perfectly structured arguments, sharp evidence and a killer conclusion.
Master of the timeline! The Timekeeper will not let you pass unless you can place every event in its proper place.
Two historians walk into a room and disagree about everything. Can you weigh up their arguments and reach your own judgement?
